name: 18_Image_Enhancement_SRGAN_DIV2K_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kuboresha picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRGAN (unaweza kupata SRGAN iliyofunzwa awali [hapa](https://github.com/tensorlayer/srgan)) na seti ya data ya DIV2K, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://data.vision.ee.ethz.ch/cvl/DIV2K/). Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kusindika picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano uliyojifunza awali uliowekwa chini ya `models/saved_models/` kuokoa muda, na hifadhi picha zilizoboreshwa kwenye saraka ya `results/figures/`. Aidha, mfumo unapaswa kuonyesha na kuhifadhi kulinganisha kati ya picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kwenye `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`. Hatimaye, unda ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo kwenye seti tofauti za sampuli ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.
Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti tofauti za sampuli zinapaswa kuchaguliwa ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no actual code for loading the DIV2K dataset from a file path, downloading it, or reading image data. The file mentions "DIV2K" in a list of keywords and requirement notes, but does not implement any real dataset loading logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The project structure shows a dedicated `models/saved_models` directory, and the trajectory evidence confirms that the pre-trained SRGAN model was successfully loaded from `models/saved_models/srgan_generator.pth` without any errors or warnings. The environment feedback indicates the model files are in a stable state and have been successfully saved and loaded, with no reported issues related to file corruption, loading failures, or configuration problems.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with generic return values like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no concrete code for image preprocessing operations such as resizing or normalization. The trajectory evidence confirms that actual processing attempts resulted in `MemoryError` and `RuntimeWarning`, indicating the placeholder functions were not properly implemented to handle the task requirements.

judge_stats.criteria: Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the attempt to read the key output file `enhanced_comparison.png` resulted in an error. The error message indicates "No endpoints found that support image input" (404), which means the file could not be accessed or read successfully. While the trajectory evidence suggests `savefig` operations executed without reported errors, the inability to verify the actual content of the saved image file means the requirement for successfully saved enhanced images in the `results/figures/` folder cannot be confirmed as met.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement to display and save a comparison of original and enhanced images as `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png` is not satisfied. The key evidence shows that an attempt to read this file resulted in an error: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory indicates the `savefig()` operation executed without runtime errors, the subsequent inability to read the file suggests it may not have been created successfully, contains corrupted data, or is in an unsupported format. The existence of the file path in the project structure does not guarantee its content is a valid, viewable comparison image as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is for a Markdown file containing results and metrics to be generated and saved as `results/report.md`. The provided evidence shows the content of this file is `('placeholder', None)`, which is not a valid Markdown report with actual results or metrics. The file exists but contains only a placeholder tuple, indicating the required content has not been produced.
